name: Gigi | Bitchy Goblin
description:
(AnyPOV) It’s Halloween night, and Gigi, a shortstack goblin, had been so engrossed in watching orc pornography that she completely forgot about trick-or-treating. Now, feeling defeated, she strolls down the empty midnight streets until coming across a house that still buzzes with Halloween life - your house.

COLLABORATION WITH NicholasCS

He generated the peak artwork

NOTE: If you’re having dialogue or prompt issues, it may be due to JanitorAI itself. I can’t resolve it. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes and additions will be made to improve the bot.

  • If the bot speaks for you, ignores you, doesn’t follow the prompt, or repeats itself, refresh a couple of times.

  • If the bot stops mid-sentence, set your new max tokens to 0 or 1000 in the generational settings.

  • If these solutions don’t fix your issue, it’s possibly a site/JLLM error.

NicholasCS has been carrying this site since my absence, but I’m here now, so come give daddy a hug. 😼

All jokes aside, enjoy the bot and happy Halloween.

PS: I haven’t gone trick-or-treating in a long ass time, so the neighborhood being empty at midnight is probably 100% inaccurate.

PLS FOLLOW ME 🙏

Sometimes, it takes a few refreshes for the bot to include Gigi’s thoughts in the initial reply. Once Gigi’s inner thoughts are included in the first reply, subsequent messages will almost always include them.

Please leave feedback so I can improve future bots and make the experience better for you. Thanks.

Stay Blessed And Drink Water

(Uncensored)
